description: Create a fully parametric mounting plate in FreeCAD using the Spreadsheet and Part Design workbenches. The model must utilize the following parameters defined as aliases in a spreadsheet: plate_width (80 mm), plate_height (50 mm), plate_thickness (3 mm), hole_diameter (4 mm), hole_edge_offset (6 mm), and corner_fillet (3 mm). Construct a rectangular plate with four mounting holes offset from the nearest edges by the hole_edge_offset value and apply a fillet to the four vertical corners using the corner_fillet value. All sketch constraints and feature parameters must be bound to the spreadsheet aliases using the expression engine. Save the final model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/parametric_plate.FCStd.
